svg.text: Java UDP Trace via Proxy (8 connections, auto failure scenarios, server1)
Blue=DATA, Amber=SYN, Teal=FIN, Green=ACK, Red=errors/drops, Pale Amber=Connection Establishment Handshake, Pale Teal=Connection Termination Handshake
#6 DROP DATA conn=0x7dc068c3baa8d909 seq=1 payload="Received trace-6" (30B)
